title: RLFoliage
description: BetterFoliage fork to improve performance, memory usage, and rendering issues.
body:
**NOTICE: This is a fork of ["BetterFoliage" by octarine_noise](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-foliage), licensed MIT, for the original mod please go to their page, all credits go to them and their contributors.**
**This fork removes the "Round Logs" feature for performance reasons, if you want round logs use the original mod.**
 
**REQUIRES FermiumBooter**

RLFoliage is a fork of BetterFoliage, a client-side cosmetic mod that adds many cosmetic features such as improved leaf, grass, nether-rack, and soul-sand rendering, among other features.

RLFoliage is a full rewrite of BetterFoliage into Java, and fixes many performance and rendering issues including compatibility with VintageFix. View the 2.5.0 changelog for many of these fixes.

RLFoliage has been tested to be working, however if you have any issues please report them to the linked issue tracker, not the original mod's issue tracker.
